summary.lv: Activa Management klienta (IT pakalpojumu sniedzējs) meklē klientu atbalsta speciālistu, kas atbalstīs klientus un sadarbosies ar produkta un izstrādes komandām.
summary.en: An Activa Management client (IT solutions provider) is hiring a Customer Support Specialist to support clients and collaborate with product and engineering teams.
